summary: Inspected the local git state on `feature/space` and reviewed the uncommitted ticket changes. The source updates implement a space-themed calculator UI in `index.html` and `styles.css`, add laser-style button/key audio feedback in `app.js`, and extend `tests/calculator.test.js` to cover the audio path. The repository is not in a rebase state; the current worktree also includes runner artifacts in `.codex-last-message.json`, `.codex-output-schema.json`, and untracked `.codex-bin/`.
commitMessage: Create a space-themed calculator UI with laser sounds
testingInstructions:
From `/Users/robertandrews/.codex/runner-workspaces/ticket-6-nUXRQQ/worktree`, run:
1. `npm ci`
2. `npm run test`
3. `npm run build`
Optional manual check: run `npm start`, open `http://localhost:4180`, and press calculator buttons to confirm the space theme and laser sounds.
